# Auto-Generated File Protection

These files are generated by `generate_unrolled.cs` and contain the marker:
```
// <auto-generated>
// This file was generated by generate_unrolled.cs
// Do not edit manually.
// </auto-generated>
```

- **Never edit these files directly.** All changes must go through `generate_unrolled.cs`.
- If a bug or feature requires changes to `NetworkSort.cs`, `NetworkSort.Unrolled.cs`, or `NetworkData.cs`, modify the generator script instead and re-run it.
- Run the generator: `dotnet run generate_unrolled.cs`
- After regenerating, run `dotnet test` to verify correctness.
